commands_run: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_side_effects_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_side_effects_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
failure_reason: Added a Form-native side-effect execution carrier for native mutation trust-envelope intents. The first validation exposed an extra closing paren in native-mutation-side-effects.fk, which returned a closure and made the TypeScript kernel reject the module; the structural fix made the sibling band return 11111. The live script then returned verdict 11111111 after executing cache-invalidation receipt, parent-edge repair, contributor-key audit, and rollback receipt against throwaway Postgres. Public mutation traffic remains FastAPI by default, with the next boundary now route-runner binding and a reversible public gate.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_side_effects_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_side_effects_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
